payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "My apologies. Mertin!" He's over there, he's currently putting the head into a small case and closing up and he goes, "Aye, not to worry I'll be more than happy to get this for you." And he leaves for a second, comes back, goes through the contract, reads a couple things. Pulls out a large chest and begins divvying up coin and throws a satchel to each of you that contains, for both of you divided for this contract that would come to 2,250 gold pieces.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It should speak pretty loudly that we came to you first. That's how much we trust you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Can we count on you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) "I am Huntmaster of the Slayer's Take. I deal in contracts, I deal in business, I deal in the hunting of relatively unorganized creatures. This-- this is beyond me. That is not to say I would not be willing to help, but there are many things to consider first. Perhaps you should speak with Osysa."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What, who?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Osysa."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Osysa?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: The sphinx.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Our patron of Ioun."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "She would have a better mind for this than me, this is..."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How do we talk to her?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The same way you did last time."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Follow me."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Before we go, I believe we have a little settling-up to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: I'm cold and I still haven't been paid.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "Regardless... Shall we? Very well." And she begins walking further to the back of the guild hall, where you come to the same doorway that you previously entered with her before. The chains in the side, that sets up a large slab that leads to a staircase that leads to the subterranean area right beneath the Slayer's Take. You may have noticed it previously, but there is a structure above where the subterranean area is, behind the Slayer's Take. And it's-- it looks like a very simple temple. You haven't really gone into it, but as you step down into this dark area underneath you can see the sconces lighting along with you as you step into this dark cavern. As it opens up once again, you can see the remnants of this hidden temple to Ioun, the Goddess of Knowledge. And what's curious about this temple is Ioun is a goddess of knowledge and openness. One of her main astute pushes is the fact that knowledge is to be shared and spread, so it's curious to see that something of hers is hidden. There's probably a purpose to that. Pushing up the steps again, Vanessa puts her hand up and tells you all to stop and calls out again. "Osysa! I apologize to bother you, but we have a predicament that I believe requires your attention." As a moment passes, where once again you hear the low, rumbling growl in the shadows. (growls) You hear slams of giant footfalls across stone as what little bit of light torches begin to spark to life around the top of this platform, this stone platform. And at the very top of this staircase that leads to the top of where this platform ends, you can see standing above it a very large female sphinx with a lion body, a female head adorned with golden jewels around the neck, eyes that are light sky blue and white in color. Proud as these giant griffin-like wings stretch out and the entity comes to rest at the top, paws folded over the edge. "Yes, I recall. So what do you need of me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Pleasure, as always.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: They have more than we do.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, they don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Thank you very much.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course, that's what I'm here for!"

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: It was an interesting challenge, thank you. We had a rather good time with that one.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Interesting trying to track it down, that's for damn sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What was it hiding as, by the way?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: A plethora of different entities and beings, it was running around town changing at will.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Isn't that like that rakshasa you were talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It seems familiar, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Does sound familiar. That was interesting and bloody!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yup!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "The ziggurats were not of his construction. But he took them." Her eyes wince for a moment. Her head turns for a minute, her vision and face staring in the distance. "I look out to follow the anger, the swath of death and hatred. Those who took Emon, they draw my gaze. Something is happening."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "What do you know?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Dark creatures attempted to, as best that we can surmise, open a gate beneath the castle of Whitestone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Whitestone." She steps back for a second, her eyes flare up with energy again. You can see the heartstone embedded in the floor of the stone glow even brighter and brighter as she puts her paws in the side and peers into it. She begins to mutter beneath her breath. "I can see the snowy north of Tal'Dorei, the castle. Beneath, one of our corrupted temples, forgotten long ago."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Your temples?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right, so you guys head out of the Slayer's Take guildhall into Vasselheim, which is now a little more bustling than it was when you arrived. It's about midday. The sun is still not visible. There's enough cloud cover where you can see where it would be in the sky, but it's still pretty grey. No rain, and there is still relatively recent snow that covers most of the city streets, some of which has been pushed to the sides to make walkways easier. It's been snowing here in the winter rather often, as you two are both very aware. You have multiple things you want: the potion shop, there's the Platinum Sanctuary, I think last time you mentioned the Trial Forge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: They just took out Draconia, darling. All of it. Gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: I'll follow you. Anywhere. You know that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: I know. And I'll follow you.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Tell me what you want to do and I'm there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: For a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Let's go.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: If we don't like it, we'll leave. If we find something better.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: We'll leave. Okay. Leave half the gold here. They don't need to know everything that we have.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Fuck that.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: We might need it.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Then hide half the gold. I don't trust the twins as far as I can throw them.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I can read your fucking lips.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Apparently she reads lips. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Oh yes, I'd forgotten that. All right. She knows how much we have. We're going for a while.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Was I wrong, by the way? Did you see how hot Keyleth is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: She's fucking hot.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: That's what I'm saying. Let's go, we should go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're so nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We're so nice!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What the fuck is that about?!

payload.trigger_phrase: you make your way to the Quadroads
payload.raw_text: All right. So you make your way to the Quadroads.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: What the fuck is that about?!

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, so you guys head out of the Slayer's Take guildhall into Vasselheim, which is now a little more bustling than it was when you arrived. It's about midday. The sun is still not visible. There's enough cloud cover where you can see where it would be in the sky, but it's still pretty grey. No rain, and there is still relatively recent snow that covers most of the city streets, some of which has been pushed to the sides to make walkways easier. It's been snowing here in the winter rather often, as you two are both very aware. You have multiple things you want: the potion shop, there's the Platinum Sanctuary, I think last time you mentioned the Trial Forge.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: What do you guys want to do?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Exactly. So as you guys are walking around, you eventually find your way up to the same area where you found the potions from before. You can see him there, he's wearing an open red vest that falls to the ground behind him, arms are revealed, he has these thick bracers on that are really finely scrolled with brass. He's got a fine Van Dyke beard going on now. He's currently speaking with someone off to the side. "Yes, of course, I'm more than happy to, yes. You! I remember you. Oh, it's been quite some time--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, yes, yes, Keyleth is so! Fucking! Beautiful! I get it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, so are you, but what the fuck am I going to do with that? Jeez, you're fucking weird. And I walk off. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Now we're getting somewhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Coming back to the center of the Quadroads, you guys have been here before. This is where the center of the city's trade happens. Imagine the central Abdar's Promenade of Emon, as it once was, but condensed. And it is just hovels and tents and all these open shops that are crammed in this heavy space. It looks like the-- what's it, from "Hellboy II"--

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Underground mall. Yeah, yeah, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Wall to wall buildings, but people, not weird creatures. People shouting, people are-- get some proper audio for this, one second.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Fresh fish!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Fresh fish!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "That will be 6,500 gold pieces for the lot."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "How many would you like? What do you want?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I want them all. How much?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All of them?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Bulk.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) "Well, then. Let me do my math here." He looks through it. "All right, um..."

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: By the way, as you're adding that up, I'd like to say you should tread lightly or I'm going to tell Vanessa and you'll have trouble getting anything from the Take ever again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Take? Are you with the Take?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh! Do you not see these-- These amazing--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's right, we get union discounts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes, there is indeed a discount with the Take (nervous laugh). They've been great representatives in the past, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I like you more and more, Kashaw, every time you speak.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Most people do. Ask Keyleth.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (nervous laughter) What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "With friendship discount, let me total this up a bit here."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: I walk outside, and I--

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: That gives you advantage on the roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I know, but where else are we going to find a vendor--?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Those are the Knickknacks of Kaa.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know, and they're quite valuable. But he said six thousand, six hundred and (mumbles) and we know this will cover that.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I can't. Please sir, please don't take advantage of us by taking these things from us. They're too valuable, please, I beg of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: What have you pulled out?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Knickknacks of Kaa.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: The Knickknacks of Kaa?! No, not the Knickknacks of Kaa!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (worried sigh) Now I'm doubting-- No, you know what, maybe I shouldn't trade these.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Put them away, put them away.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a deception check. Make a deception check. I would say, you know, if you wanted to--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Am I assisting?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can assist on this, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's good!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: I'll take some too, as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What is the assist?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Yeah. "Sorry, trying to host. It's been a while since I've had a guest. Would you like some?"

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I can. Three, four-- yes!" He runs off and starts rummaging through a bunch of stuff.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Victor, I was hoping you would have some black powder for sale.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'm on it, I'm on it! Hold on!" He whips around with this metallic cylinder that is very well sealed. "See, I learn from my mistakes!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's very impressive. Oh--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He walks very carefully, very gingerly placing it on the table. "Okay. Carefully." He pulls out (fwoosh) a small torch. "I have to unseal the metal."

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's not do that! And I make a quick... I'm going to try and bap the thing down as quickly as I can.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. You smack it out of his hand.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's... I trust you implicitly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Heh heh heh heh. It's coffee." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Black powder." (cackles) (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I think you've had enough. I'm going to smell the coffee. It's really coffee?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Well, no, it's probably about 1 30, 2 o'clock in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: "Medititive."

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Meeting of the minds.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. Is he like--? All right. Thank you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No worries. I mean, if I recall, he actually came and saw your last bout."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, he did! And I want to like go see him, but I don't know anything about "medititiveness," like sleeping standing up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Go over there to the Trial Forge! He's seen you once, maybe he'll say hello again."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: What should I, like, bring him a gift?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know. I don't ever talk to him."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is anybody here, like, in the room right now behind me? Are they present at the Trial Forge very often? Hey, don't be so obvious. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No clue."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right. And I flip him a silver. Bing.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's like half a penny. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We're just talking (laughs). All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) What is it, like, noon right now? (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: (singing) Day-drinking!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: "He still hasn't given me the proper details yet and he hasn't called in the debt, but he told me one day, I was to help him test someone, and he'd train me."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No way! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah. What, you think being a half-orc's great? No! It's bullshit!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I know! You think goliath is any better? It's the same fucking thing!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "At least you're made for this weather! It's cold out here!"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's true, it is fucking cold out here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah, it is."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I can only imagine. I'm really sorry I took your lip off, by the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Sorry I took yours off, too."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's true. Mine healed better.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yeah."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Hey, so. When you trained with him, because you were doing all that yoga pilates stuff. Did it help you out?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, obviously not, really."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right. What did he ask in exchange for the tutorial?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He didn't ask for any pay. He--"

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Oh god, what did he ask for?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "He told me I had--"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (mutters) Pretty eyes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "--to help someone." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Help someone.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: A few hours, two hours, let's say. It's four, five o'clock in the afternoon.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: When our party gets--

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: I have men and women telling me I'm incredible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You are very attractive.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: That's, wow, that's two.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I just met you, and I don't know much about you, but are you more of a Vax man or a Vex man? Like, how do you roll? How do you--?

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: I don't, again, I don't know what that means. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Would you be interested in the rogue or the ranger?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're identical.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Oh! I see what you're saying. All right, I get it. I go taco, not hot dog.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yes! I love taco!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: High five it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Respect. Respect.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are we sober yet? Can we go find Kima?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we're sober!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I think we need to go to bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Yes. Let's get a break.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: After a brief time of coffee and a bit of sobering, you find yourselves of sound enough mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 17 hours later?! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Coffee, coffee.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: I metabolize things very quickly, you'd be surprised.

payload.raw_text: I heard a couple, too. You guys would enjoy it, so make it happen, please. I want to see it. Also, a reminder that if you want to help support the channel, check out the Geek and Sundry Amazon Wish List. You can find the list in chat if you type "!Wishlist" there and that will give you access to it and you can see if there's any way you want to help build the channel and make it more awesome. So there's that. Liam will join us when he can. But we're going to jump in for the time being. So, as you guys exit the tavern, you look out into the Braving Fields.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: All right, guys, we'll see you here in a few minutes. Thank you. (laughter)

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns_last5.text: Welcome back, everyone. So, before we get back into this, a couple quick announcements. One, if we get to 15,000 subscribers tonight, tomorrow's crew will be celebrating 15k and a Cosplay Day. All of our crew will be dressing up as their favorite characters all night. So you guys should go ahead and see if we can hit that number, because that would be awesome and hilarious and awesome.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns_last5.text: I might have heard what some people are going to be dressing up as and I'm very excited about it.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's been a few hours, and you guys have had some coffee, so you're still a little tipsy, but you're not useless. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't really feel like fighting. I just want to go talk to Master Splinter at the Trial Forge.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure, sure. All right, we can do that another day, maybe? Or do you want to--?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm not in a rush.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Should we go to the Platinum Sanctuary? Where Kima is, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Let's go talk to Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, should we wait until some people are more sober?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: No, I'm all right, coffee helps. Coffee helps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Walking will help.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Walking and coffee.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Maybe we should-- they can wait outside or something.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But I miss Kima.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh Jesus.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You follow it up the side and it is an extended staircase that curves up to these three silver spires that are pushing out from the side of the mountain, quite a ways up. After about almost 20 minutes of stair climbing, your legs start to cramp a bit, but you manage to make your way towards the top, the outside of the large stone doors. There you can see there are two Scalebearers of Vord, in their silver armor, blue cloaks at their back, weapons at the ready, just looking out. And as soon as you guys approach the top of the stairway, they change their stance to be a little more prepared.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, that's right.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Turns, nods to the other guy. They both grab these small handles and give a tug, and the door opens slightly and one of the guys disappears between the two doors. About 30 seconds pass to a minute, before he steps back out. "Your presence has been accepted by the Highbearer Vord, the Silvertouched. He will greet you in the central chamber, please."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (panting) Guys, this is hard to do with alcohol in your system.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Hard to do at all.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: A lot of horses and chickens around here, too.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: I noticed that as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I didn't know this was a farming industry.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello there. Excuse us. We are of the Slayer's Take-- Is that a good thing?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We are of the Slayer's Take and we ask for entry into your Platinum Temple.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Your business is with whom?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Lady Kima.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: It's roughly three days' travel, southwest of Vasselheim.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Cobalt Reserve, he said twice.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, but that's in Westruun.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's been destroyed.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Not necessarily, I mean yes, it's fucked up.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We still need to go talk to Earthbearer Groon and see what kind of lesson was there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I also really need to check out the Fire Ashari.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Fire Ashari are on the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's count out the things that we want to do. Not what we're going to choose, just what we have to do, and then we'll choose something. We've got the Cobalt Reserve, which may or may not be totally fucked, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: It could give us information about these dragons.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We need to go by there regardless. We need to stop by Westruun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So there's Osysa's mate.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's down by Westruun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Down by Westruun, in the mountains.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That's on the way.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. We've got your people.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also on the way out the door.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It is?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's not far from here.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: I need you three to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Gonna get smackdown.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your feet go out from under you as you slam onto your back, you just barely caught your breath before it's almost knocked out again. He's looking down at you this time, once again, his eyes just white. "Choose. Choose the two here who would save you."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Pike's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Who would push you to your potential. Choose your bloody muses."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Does he mean us, or?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do they have to be here?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He looks over to the rest of you on the side of the pit. "Choose."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (sighs) I choose my buddy Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: She's not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I don't care, I just say it anyway. I choose Vax and I choose Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We give him his strength, sir.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you finish that sentence, two monks that you failed to notice were behind you shove both of you into the pit. Make acrobatics checks, both of you guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (laughing nervously) Not my kind of fight! Oh, I got a ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You tumble, catch Grog's arm, and lift him onto his feet as you land yourself at his side. Scanlan is face-down in the sand.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are we talking still?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I would just like to point out that I am mostly sober.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Groon takes two steps back and just closes his eyes and puts his arms at his sides. "Now. Show me your conviction."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Oh snap!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: All right. It's now his turn. All right, so.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. As you move aside, even on the ground, prone, he swings his leg out to try and catch you as you're running past.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Acrobatics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He has disadvantage on this anyway. That is still a 24 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: To hit? Oh, that's an attack. Even though he was unconscious?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Well, he woke up after you slammed him, second attack hits, and in reaction as he sees you rush off, he kicks his leg up and manages to catch you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I'm feeling that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It doesn't manage to trip you, but it does deal--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Uncanny Dodge.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So you deal half the damage on that. All right. So you take-- What would be 12 points of damage, you take six points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ah, fucking ankle. Come on.

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: It was still uncanny.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It was quite uncanny. All right, that ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: However, it's now his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And then throw a dagger past Grog at him. For-- not that great. 19.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 19, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misses, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I threw him, I threw a dagger and missed, and I just juke to the right and get behind Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So move there. At the end of your turn, he's gonna use his last action point to do an unarmed attack against Grog. That's gonna be a 21?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pretty sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hits? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, pretty sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take ten points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Halved to five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Half. He's gonna use another ki point to, I need you to make a constitution save.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. As he turns back and slams his fist right in the center of your clavicle, you feel a crack in the sternum and your whole body, all your muscles just seize up and you are currently stunned from a stunning strike until the end of his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We got this, guys.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: But you're still stunned. He is now going to, since you don't have a threat to him, he's going to swing around, jump between the two of them, and he's gonna do a flurry of blows, two punches against each of you. Against Scanlan, that's a 17?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: 19, that's it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Misses, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so I threw him, I threw a dagger and missed, and I just juke to the right and get behind Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So move there. At the end of your turn, he's gonna use his last action point to do an unarmed attack against Grog. That's gonna be a 21?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Pretty sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It hits? Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, pretty sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take ten points of bludgeoning damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Halved to five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Half. He's gonna use another ki point to, I need you to make a constitution save.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. As he turns back and slams his fist right in the center of your clavicle, you feel a crack in the sternum and your whole body, all your muscles just seize up and you are currently stunned from a stunning strike until the end of his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We got this, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, it's now his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: You have a limited number of bardic inspirations per short rest that you can use, and you've used quite a few this battle.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Okay. 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 17. As he turns back and slams his fist right in the center of your clavicle, you feel a crack in the sternum and your whole body, all your muscles just seize up and you are currently stunned from a stunning strike until the end of his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We got this, guys.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: However, it's now his next turn.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: But you're still stunned. He is now going to, since you don't have a threat to him, he's going to swing around, jump between the two of them, and he's gonna do a flurry of blows, two punches against each of you. Against Scanlan, that's a 17?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That's my armor class, 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That hits, okay. Second one is a 17 again.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Can I use my Cutting Words on that one?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you have any more uses of your bardic inspiration?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's once per turn.

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: At this point, he, Groon's not even looking at you guys, still looking at Grog, he goes, "You need not the strength of Vasselheim to aid you, nor is that strength any we have to give. What you need can be found, recovered, reborn. I can see in your face the path is already lying before you. I know of two. The rest you must find yourself. A gift from Kord himself to this mortal plane, carved from the corpse of the earth primordial titan that fell on this continent in the first war. These Titanstone Knuckles were a symbol of power and leadership for generations here in Vasselheim until the last known keeper was slain 200 years ago, the gauntlets taken. I know not of their whereabouts. The other, leathers adorned by the champion of the Raven Queen. This champion's tomb has since come to ruin, sunken beneath a lake to the west of here known as the Marrowglade Loch. Within that tomb lies the Deathwalker's Ward. Now go. You've found your strength. You know your path. I can help you no further." He turns around, walks back to the center of the sand, and just sits back down in the same pose and position he was in when you entered.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In my friends.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The darkness around you immediately shatters and you can see now your friends off to the side, keeping their weapons ready. The entirety of Groon's posture has dropped, and he just bows before you. (cheering)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: Yes! Yes!

preceding_turns.speaker: WILL
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At this point, he takes a moment and closes his eyes, and you can see there's this inner glow in his chest, and a bunch of his wounds heal up in but an instant. And as those wounds leave these scars, he looks across the body. "I will wear these with pride."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (strained) So will I. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh, fuck. Zahra! Did you see how awesome that was? I was really good.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARY
preceding_turns.text: That was wonder-- you still have a little sand right there.
